annotation.technical_notes: A sparse, high-decay particle system emits transient streaks from the center, driven by high-frequency components of the music. Custom waves or motion vectors are gated to beat-detection thresholds, creating brief, energetic bursts that immediately decay into the black background. The minimal frame feedback via sampler_main prevents persistent trails, maintaining a stark, cosmic aesthetic.

compatibility.note: capture was empty (172988 bytes); preset doesn't render meaningfully against the current test signal
